title: Gujarat Dwarka Somnath Express
overview:
A quick spiritual getaway covering Gujarat's two most sacred Jyotirlings — Dwarka and Somnath. Perfect for a long weekend trip from Ahmedabad.
Visit Dwarkadhish Temple, Bet Dwarka, Nageshwar Jyotirling and Somnath Temple with comfortable stays and private transfers.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Somnath to Ahmedabad Drop
itinerary.detail: Return transfer to Ahmedabad airport (400 kms / 8 hrs)

title: Thailand Krabi Phuket Delight
overview: Experience the best of Thailand with this 6-day Krabi and Phuket adventure. Explore stunning beaches, island-hop through crystal-clear waters, visit iconic temples, and enjoy thrilling water activities. From the limestone cliffs of Krabi to the vibrant nightlife of Phuket, this...
highlights: Phuket city tour with Big Buddha

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Krabi
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Krabi Airport, transfer to hotel. Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure exploring Ao Nang Beach area.

itinerary.title: Day 2: 4 Island Tour
itinerary.detail: Full day 4 Island tour visiting Tup Island, Chicken Island, Poda Island and Phra Nang Cave Beach. Enjoy snorkeling and swimming in crystal waters.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Tiger Cave Temple & Transfer to Phuket
itinerary.detail: Visit the iconic Tiger Cave Temple in the morning. After lunch, transfer to Phuket and check in at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Phi Phi Island Tour
itinerary.detail: Full day Phi Phi Island tour. Visit Maya Bay, Monkey Beach, Viking Cave, and enjoy snorkeling in turquoise waters.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Phuket City Tour
itinerary.detail: Visit Big Buddha, Wat Chalong Temple, Old Phuket Town, and enjoy shopping. Evening free for Patong Beach nightlife.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: After breakfast, transfer to Phuket International Airport for your departure flight.

whats_included:
• Return airport transfers

• 5 nights hotel accommodation

• Daily breakfast

• 4 Island Tour Krabi

• Phi Phi Island Tour

• Phuket City Tour

• All transfers between cities

• English speaking guide

title: Thailand Koh Tao Scuba Diving
overview: Dive into the crystal-clear waters of Koh Tao, Thailand's premier diving destination. This adventure package includes PADI-certified scuba diving sessions, island exploration, and beach relaxation. Perfect for both beginners and experienced divers looking to explore vibrant...
highlights: Explore Koh Tao's vibrant coral reefs

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Koh Tao
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Koh Tao via ferry from Chumphon. Check in at beachside resort. Evening orientation and diving briefing.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Scuba Diving Day 1
itinerary.detail: Morning pool training session followed by first open water dive. Afternoon second dive at a different site. Evening free to explore Sairee Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Advanced Diving & Koh Nang Yuan
itinerary.detail: Morning dive at deeper sites. Afternoon visit to Koh Nang Yuan for the famous viewpoint hike and snorkeling at Japanese Gardens.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Island Exploration
itinerary.detail: Free day to explore Koh Tao. Options include ATV rides, rock climbing, cooking class, or relaxing at Shark Bay and Freedom Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Departure
itinerary.detail: After breakfast, transfer to the pier for ferry departure. Connect to your onward journey.

whats_included:
• Ferry transfers

• 4 nights beachside accommodation

• Daily breakfast

• PADI diving sessions with equipment

• Koh Nang Yuan trip

• Snorkeling equipment

• English speaking dive instructor

title: Vietnam Hanoi Explorer
overview: Discover the charm of Hanoi and Ha Long Bay in this compact Vietnam getaway. Explore ancient temples, vibrant street markets, French colonial architecture, and cruise through the UNESCO-listed Ha Long Bay with its thousands of limestone islands.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Hanoi
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Noi Bai Airport, transfer to hotel in Old Quarter. Evening walking tour of Hanoi's vibrant streets and night market.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.detail: Visit Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Temple of Literature, and Hoan Kiem Lake. Evening Water Puppet Show.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Ha Long Bay Cruise
itinerary.detail: Drive to Ha Long Bay. Board cruise ship and sail through limestone karsts. Visit Sung Sot Cave, kayak through hidden lagoons. Overnight on cruise.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Ha Long Bay & Return
itinerary.detail: Early morning Tai Chi on deck. Visit Titop Island for panoramic views. Return cruise to harbor and transfer back to Hanoi.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Departure
itinerary.detail: Free morning for last-minute shopping. Transfer to Noi Bai Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 3 nights hotel in Hanoi

• 1 night Ha Long Bay cruise

• Daily breakfast, lunch & dinner on cruise

• Hanoi city tour

• Ha Long Bay cruise with activities

• Water Puppet Show tickets

• English speaking guide

title: Vietnam Phu Quoc & Danang Beach
overview: Combine Vietnam's two best beach destinations in one trip. Start with the pristine Phu Quoc island, known for pearl farms and sunset views, then fly to Danang for the iconic Golden Bridge, Marble Mountains, and the ancient town of Hoi An.
highlights: Golden Bridge at Ba Na Hills

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Phu Quoc
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Phu Quoc Airport, transfer to beach resort. Evening free to explore Dinh Cau Night Market.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Phu Quoc Island Tour
itinerary.detail: Full day island tour including Vinpearl Safari, Sao Beach, fish sauce factory, and pepper farm. Sunset at Long Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Phu Quoc Snorkeling
itinerary.detail: Southern island snorkeling trip visiting An Thoi archipelago. Swim with colorful fish and enjoy lunch on the boat.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Fly to Danang
itinerary.detail: Morning flight to Danang. Check in at hotel. Afternoon visit Marble Mountains and My Khe Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Ba Na Hills & Golden Bridge
itinerary.detail: Full day at Ba Na Hills. Ride the cable car, walk the iconic Golden Bridge, explore French Village and Fantasy Park.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Hoi An Ancient Town
itinerary.detail: Day trip to Hoi An. Explore the Japanese Bridge, ancient merchant houses, lantern-lined streets, and local tailoring shops.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Departure
itinerary.detail: After breakfast, transfer to Danang Airport for departure.

title: Vietnam North to South Explorer
overview: Experience the full length of Vietnam from Hanoi in the north to Ho Chi Minh City in the south. This comprehensive tour covers Ha Long Bay, the imperial city of Hue, the ancient town of Hoi An, the Golden Bridge in Danang, and the bustling streets of Saigon with Cu Chi Tunnels.

itinerary.detail: Arrive in Hanoi. Transfer to hotel. Evening Old Quarter walking tour and street food experience.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Ha Long Bay
itinerary.detail: Full day Ha Long Bay cruise through limestone karsts, visit caves, kayaking, and swimming. Return to Hanoi evening.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Hanoi to Hue
itinerary.detail: Morning Hanoi city tour. Afternoon flight to Hue. Evening walk along the Perfume River.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Hue Imperial City
itinerary.detail: Visit the Imperial Citadel, Thien Mu Pagoda, and Royal Tombs. Dragon boat ride on the Perfume River.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Hue to Danang & Hoi An
itinerary.detail: Scenic drive via Hai Van Pass to Danang. Visit Marble Mountains. Continue to Hoi An for evening lantern walk.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Hoi An & Golden Bridge
itinerary.detail: Morning Hoi An exploration. Afternoon Ba Na Hills and Golden Bridge excursion.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.detail: Flight to HCMC. Afternoon city tour: Notre Dame Cathedral, Central Post Office, Ben Thanh Market.

itinerary.title: Day 8: Cu Chi Tunnels & Mekong
itinerary.detail: Morning Cu Chi Tunnels visit. Afternoon Mekong Delta boat trip through floating markets and coconut villages.

whats_included:
• All airport transfers

• 8 nights hotel accommodation

• Internal flights (Hanoi-Hue, Danang-HCMC)

• Daily breakfast

• Ha Long Bay day cruise

• All city tours and entrance fees

• English speaking guides throughout

itinerary.title: Day 5: Leisure Day
itinerary.detail: Free day to enjoy Atlantis facilities, private beach, or shopping at Mall of the Emirates.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Dubai Airport for departure.

title: Seychelles Island Combo
overview: A romantic Seychelles getaway combining the beauty of Mahe and Praslin islands. Enjoy pristine beaches, tropical forests, giant tortoises, and crystal-clear waters in this Indian Ocean paradise.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Mahe
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Mahe. Transfer to beach resort. Evening sunset at Beau Vallon Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Mahe Island Tour
itinerary.detail: Victoria city tour, Sir Selwyn Selwyn-Clarke Market, Tea Factory, Morne Seychellois views, beach hopping.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Ferry to Praslin
itinerary.detail: Ferry to Praslin island. Visit Vallee de Mai UNESCO World Heritage site. Afternoon Anse Lazio Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Praslin Exploration
itinerary.detail: Snorkeling trip, visit Curieuse Island for giant tortoises, and enjoy Anse Georgette Beach.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Return to Mahe
itinerary.detail: Ferry back to Mahe. Afternoon free at the beach. Evening romantic dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Seychelles International Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 3 nights Mahe + 2 nights Praslin

• Daily breakfast

• Ferry transfers

• Mahe island tour

• Vallee de Mai entry

• Snorkeling trip

• English speaking guide

title: Best of Seychelles
overview: Experience the very best of Seychelles with premium beach resorts, island excursions, and exclusive experiences. This curated tour features the top beaches, nature reserves, and dining experiences in the archipelago.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Mahe
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Mahe. Transfer to premium resort. Welcome drink and beach relaxation.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Mahe Highlights
itinerary.detail: Victoria tour, botanical gardens, Anse Intendance beach, Creole cooking class.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Praslin Island
itinerary.detail: Fly to Praslin. Vallee de Mai, Anse Lazio, and sunset dinner at beachfront restaurant.

itinerary.title: Day 4: La Digue Day Trip
itinerary.detail: Ferry to La Digue. Visit famous Anse Source d'Argent beach. Cycle around the island. Giant tortoises.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Leisure & Snorkeling
itinerary.detail: Morning snorkeling at Ste. Anne Marine Park. Afternoon spa treatment. Evening farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to airport for departure.

• 5 nights premium resort

title: Seychelles Grand Tour 10 Nights
overview: The ultimate Seychelles experience covering all three main islands - Mahe, Praslin, and La Digue - over 10 nights. Extended stays allow deep exploration of each island's unique beaches, nature reserves, and culture.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Mahe
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Mahe. Transfer to resort. Evening Beau Vallon Beach sunset.

itinerary.title: Day 2-3: Mahe Exploration
itinerary.detail: Victoria tour, Morne Seychellois hike, beach hopping (Anse Intendance, Anse Royal), botanical gardens, Creole dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 4-6: Praslin Island
itinerary.detail: Ferry to Praslin. Vallee de Mai, Anse Lazio, Anse Georgette, snorkeling at St. Pierre Island, sunset cruise.

itinerary.title: Day 7-9: La Digue Island
itinerary.detail: Ferry to La Digue. Anse Source d'Argent, cycling tour, Grand Anse beach, L'Union Estate, tortoise sanctuary.

itinerary.title: Day 10: Return to Mahe
itinerary.detail: Ferry back to Mahe. Afternoon spa treatment. Farewell Creole dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 11: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to airport for departure.

title: Sri Lanka Bentota & Yala Safari
overview: Combine Sri Lanka's beautiful beaches with thrilling wildlife safari. Relax on the golden shores of Bentota before heading to Yala National Park for leopard and elephant spotting. A perfect blend of beach and adventure.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Bandaranaike Airport. Transfer to Bentota beach resort. Evening beach walk.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Bentota Beach & Water Sports
itinerary.detail: Morning Madu River boat safari through mangroves. Afternoon water sports: jet skiing, banana boat, snorkeling.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Galle & Turtle Hatchery
itinerary.detail: Visit Galle Fort UNESCO site. Stop at turtle hatchery. Transfer to Yala area.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Yala National Park Safari
itinerary.detail: Early morning full-day safari in Yala National Park. Spot leopards, elephants, sloth bears, and crocodiles.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Return to Colombo
itinerary.detail: Drive back to Colombo. Afternoon city tour: Gangaramaya Temple, Pettah Market, Galle Face Green.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 5 nights hotel

• Daily breakfast

• Madu River boat safari

• Galle Fort tour

• Yala full-day safari with jeep

• Turtle hatchery

• English speaking guide

title: Egypt Cairo Explorer 5 Nights
overview: Discover the wonders of ancient Egypt with this 6-day Cairo-focused tour. Visit the Great Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and take a Nile dinner cruise. Experience 5,000 years of history in the land of the pharaohs.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Cairo
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Cairo Airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening Nile corniche walk.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Pyramids & Sphinx
itinerary.detail: Visit the Great Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, and Valley Temple. Optional camel ride. Evening Sound & Light Show.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Egyptian Museum & Old Cairo
itinerary.detail: Grand Egyptian Museum tour including Tutankhamun treasures. Afternoon Coptic Cairo and Hanging Church.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Saqqara & Memphis
itinerary.detail: Day trip to Saqqara Step Pyramid and ancient city of Memphis. Visit Dahshur Bent Pyramid.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Khan el-Khalili & Nile Cruise
itinerary.detail: Morning Islamic Cairo and Khan el-Khalili bazaar shopping. Evening Nile dinner cruise with entertainment.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Cairo Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 5 nights hotel

• Daily breakfast

• Pyramids & Sphinx tour

• Egyptian Museum entry

• Saqqara & Memphis trip

• Nile dinner cruise

• Sound & Light Show

• English speaking Egyptologist guide

title: Egypt Cairo Quick Tour
overview: A quick Cairo getaway covering the essential highlights in just 4 days. Visit the Pyramids, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and enjoy a Nile cruise - perfect for a short stopover or weekend trip.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Cairo

itinerary.title: Day 3: Old Cairo & Bazaar
itinerary.detail: Coptic Cairo, Islamic Cairo, and Khan el-Khalili bazaar shopping. Afternoon free for exploration.

title: Kenya Nairobi Masai Mara Safari
overview: Experience the world-famous Masai Mara on this classic Kenya safari. Spot the Big Five, witness the Great Migration (seasonal), and immerse yourself in the raw beauty of the African savannah.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Arrive at Jomo Kenyatta Airport. Transfer to hotel. Afternoon Giraffe Centre visit.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Nairobi to Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Drive to Masai Mara National Reserve. Check in at safari lodge. Afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Full Day Masai Mara Safari
itinerary.detail: Full day game drives. Spot lions, elephants, buffalo, leopards, and cheetahs. Picnic lunch in the bush.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Masai Mara & Village Visit
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive. Afternoon Masai village visit to learn about the Masai culture and traditions.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive. Drive back to Nairobi. Afternoon Nairobi National Museum or shopping.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Jomo Kenyatta Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 2 nights Nairobi hotel

• 3 nights Masai Mara lodge

• Full board on safari

• All game drives in 4x4

• Park entry fees

• Masai village visit

• English speaking driver-guide

title: Kenya Sarova Safari
overview: A premium Kenya safari staying at the renowned Sarova safari lodges. Experience luxury in the wilderness with top-tier game viewing at Masai Mara and Lake Nakuru, known for flamingos and rhinos.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Nairobi. Transfer to Sarova Stanley Hotel. Afternoon city tour.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Lake Nakuru
itinerary.detail: Drive to Lake Nakuru. Afternoon game drive to see flamingos, rhinos, and giraffes. Overnight Sarova Lion Hill.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Nakuru to Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Drive to Masai Mara. Check in at Sarova Mara Game Camp. Afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Full Day Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Full day game drives with bush breakfast. Spot Big Five and other wildlife. Evening bush dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive. Drive back to Nairobi. Overnight at Sarova Stanley.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Jomo Kenyatta Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• Sarova lodges throughout

• Full board on safari

• All game drives in 4x4

• Park entry fees

• Bush breakfast & dinner

• English speaking driver-guide

title: Kenya Aberdares & Masai Mara
overview: An extended Kenya safari combining the montane forests of the Aberdares with the open plains of Masai Mara and Lake Nakuru. Experience diverse ecosystems and incredible wildlife variety across three distinct safari destinations.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Nairobi. Transfer to hotel. Afternoon Nairobi National Park or Giraffe Centre.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Aberdares National Park
itinerary.detail: Drive to Aberdares. Check in at The Ark lodge. Afternoon/night game viewing from the lodge overlooking the waterhole.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Aberdares to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.detail: Drive through the Great Rift Valley to Lake Nakuru. Afternoon game drive for flamingos, rhinos, and lions.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Lake Nakuru to Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive at Nakuru. Drive to Masai Mara. Evening game drive on arrival.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Full Day Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Full day game drives with picnic lunch. Spot Big Five and witness incredible wildlife interactions.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Masai Mara to Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive. Drive back to Nairobi. Afternoon shopping or rest.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Jomo Kenyatta Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• 6 nights lodge/hotel

• Full board on safari

• All game drives in 4x4

• Park entry fees

• The Ark lodge experience

• English speaking driver-guide

title: Kenya Sentrim Super Value Safari
overview: The ultimate Kenya safari covering four destinations: Amboseli (Mt. Kilimanjaro views), Lake Elementaita, Masai Mara, and Nairobi. Stay at Sentrim lodges throughout for a comprehensive 8-day wildlife and landscape experience.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Nairobi to Amboseli
itinerary.detail: Arrive in Nairobi. Drive to Amboseli National Park for Mt. Kilimanjaro views and elephant herds. Check in at Sentrim Amboseli.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Full Day Amboseli Safari
itinerary.detail: Full day exploring Amboseli with morning and afternoon game drives. Observe elephants against the backdrop of Mt. Kilimanjaro.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Amboseli to Lake Elementaita
itinerary.detail: Drive through the Great Rift Valley to Lake Elementaita. Check in at Sentrim Elementaita. Enjoy lake views.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Lake Nakuru Day Trip
itinerary.detail: Full day game drive at Lake Nakuru National Park. Spot rhinos, Rothschild giraffes, lions, and flamingos.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Elementaita to Masai Mara
itinerary.detail: Drive to Masai Mara National Reserve. Arrive at Sentrim Mara and enjoy evening game drive on the Mara plains.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Full Day Masai Mara Safari
itinerary.detail: Full day exploring Masai Mara. Spot lions, elephants, buffalo, leopards, and cheetahs. Picnic lunch in the bush.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Masai Mara to Nairobi
itinerary.detail: Morning game drive. Drive back to Nairobi. Check in at Novotel Nairobi Westlands.

itinerary.title: Day 8: Departure
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport for departure.

whats_included:
• Airport transfers

• Sentrim lodges throughout

• Full board while on safari

• All game drives in 4x4 Safari Land Cruiser

• Park entry fees and conservation levies

• Daily game drives

• English speaking driver-guide

• Bottled water in vehicles
includes_short: Sentrim Lodges, Transfers, Safari, Full Board

title: Himachal Shimla Manali 4 Nights

itinerary.title: Day 1: Chandigarh to Shimla

itinerary.detail: Visit Kufri (adventure activities available), Jakhu Temple, Christ Church and Ridge. Evening stroll on Mall Road.

itinerary.detail: Visit Solang Valley (snow activities and adventure sports), Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, Old Manali and local markets.

itinerary.detail: Drive from Manali back to Chandigarh (305 km / 9-10 hrs). Drop at Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station. Tour ends.

itinerary.detail: Visit Dalai Lama Temple, Tibetan Museum, Bhagsu Nag Waterfall, and explore local Tibetan markets in McLeod Ganj.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Dalhousie to Amritsar
itinerary.detail: Drive from Dalhousie to Amritsar (approx 190 km). Check-in and evening visit to Golden Temple and Jallianwala Bagh.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Explore Amritsar
itinerary.detail: Visit Wagah Border Ceremony, Golden Temple, Durgiana Temple and local food markets. Overnight at Amritsar.

title: Himachal Manali Dharamshala Dalhousie 7 Nights

itinerary.title: Day 1: Chandigarh to Manali
itinerary.detail: Transfer from Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station to Manali. Check-in and evening stroll on Mall Road.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Explore Manali
itinerary.detail: Visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, Tibetan Monastery, Old Manali and Van Vihar. Evening at Mall Road.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Solang Valley & Manali Activities
itinerary.detail: Visit Solang Valley for snow activities, Rohtang Pass (seasonal, permit required) and Atal Tunnel. Overnight at Manali.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Manali to Dharamshala
itinerary.detail: Drive from Manali to Dharamshala (approx 250 km). Check-in and explore McLeod Ganj. Overnight at Dharamshala.

itinerary.title: Day 5: Explore Dharamshala
itinerary.detail: Visit Dalai Lama Temple, Tibetan Museum, Bhagsu Nag Waterfall and local Tibetan markets in McLeod Ganj.

itinerary.title: Day 6: Dharamshala to Dalhousie
itinerary.detail: Drive from Dharamshala to Dalhousie (approx 120 km). Check-in and explore Mall Road and Subhash Chowk.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Explore Dalhousie & Khajjiar
itinerary.detail: Visit Khajjiar (Mini Switzerland of India), Dainkund Peak and Panchpula waterfall. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Day 8: Departure from Dalhousie
itinerary.detail: Transfer to Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station (approx 360 km). Tour ends.

whats_included:
Inclusions:

• Pick up and drop from Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station

• Stay for 7 Nights on double occupancy

• 7 Breakfasts and 7 Dinners (MAP meal plan)

• Cab as per itinerary (A/C turned off in hills as per NGT norms)

• Transfer taxes, parking, fuel and driver charges

• All applicable taxes except GST
Exclusions:

• Flights, trains, ferries or other transport

itinerary.detail: Post breakfast we drive to Nubra Valley. The road journey from Leh to Nubra Valley passes over Khardung La (The Highest Motorable Road In The World) at 5,602 Mtrs / 18,390 Ft, around 39 km from Leh.

itinerary.title: Day 5: IN NUBRA (HUNDER VILLAGE)

itinerary.detail: After an early breakfast we check out from Camp or hotel and drive towards Hunder where you have opportunity to ride on a Bactrian Camel (double humped) amidst the sand dunes of this high-altitude desert with snowcapped mountains in the background. itinerary.title: Day 2: SRINAGAR TO KARGIL (VIA SONMARG) – 204 KMS / 6 TO 7 HOUR ONE WAY
itinerary.detail: Post breakfast we drive to Leh via Sonmarg also known as Meadow of Gold. In Sonmarg, one can take a pony ride (at additional cost) to Thajwas Glacier where snow remains round the year. Further we

itinerary.title: Day 3: KARGIL TO LEH (VIA LAMAYURU)
itinerary.detail: Post breakfast we drive to Leh enroute visiting Lamayuru, which belongs to Dripung Kagyu (Red Hat). After visiting the Monastery, we continue our drive along the River Indus to Uletokpo visiting

itinerary.title: Day 4: IN LEH
itinerary.detail: Morning at leisure to explore the destination on your own & evening visit to Leh Palace, Shanti Stupa & Leh Market. Dinner & overnight stay at Hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Day 5: LEH–NUBRA VALLEY VIA KHARDUNG LA 18,390 FT. (120 KMS / 4 – 5 HRS)
itinerary.detail: Post breakfast we drive to Nubra Valley. The road journey from Leh to Nubra Valley passes over Khardung La at 18,390 ft. (120 KMS / 4 - 5 HRS). Enjoy the breathtaking views and snowy peaks. On arriving at Nubra Valley check-in to the hotel/camp. Evening at leisure. Overnight at Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Day 6: NUBRA VALLEY (EXCURSION TO TURTUK) - 80 KMS ONE WAY
itinerary.detail: After an early breakfast, proceed to Turtuk (A village that was won by India in the 1971 war with Pakistan) and extremely close to the border. Places to visit here comprise of a 16th Century Mosque, (comprising of a touch of Turkish & Iranian culture) and also a fort. Return to camp. Evening at leisure. Overnight at Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Day 7: NUBRA VALLEY TO PANGONG LAKE (150 KMS / 5 HRS)
itinerary.detail: After an early breakfast, we check out and drive towards Hunder where you have the opportunity to ride on a Bactrian Camel (double humped) amidst the sand dunes of this high-altitude desert with snowcapped mountains on the horizon. Proceed to Pangong Lake. Check in to camp/hotel. Evening at leisure. Overnight at Pangong.

itinerary.title: Day 8: PANGONG LAKE TO LEH VIA CHANGLA (140 KMS / 6 HRS)
itinerary.detail: Morning at leisure to explore the beauty of the lake which is famously known to show up to 5 shades of blue depending upon the time and location of the viewer. Later we drive back to Leh via Changla Pass 5486 Mtrs enroute visiting Hemis Gompa. Arrive Leh. Overnight at Leh.

Visit a 16th Century Mosque, (comprising of a touch of Turkish & Iranian culture) and also a fort. Return to camp. Evening at leisure. Overnight at Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Day 7: Inter Hotel/City Transfer from Nubra Valley to Pangong
itinerary.detail: After an early breakfast we check out from Camp or hotel and drive towards Hunder where you have opportunity to ride on a Bactrian Camel (double humped) amidst the sand dunes of this high-altitude desert with snowcapped mountains in the background. Proceed to Pangong Lake. Check in to camp/hotel. Evening at leisure. Overnight at Pangong.

itinerary.title: Day 8: PANGONG LAKE TO LEH VIA CHANGLA
itinerary.detail: Morning at leisure to explore the beauty of the lake and later we drive back to Leh via Changla Pass 5486 Mtrs en route visiting Hemis Gompa, the largest monastic foundation of Drukpa Kagyu Order of Tibetan Buddhism. Arrive Leh. Overnight at Leh.

title: Malaysia Kuala Lumpur Langkawi 6D/5N
overview: Explore the best of Malaysia with this 6 Days / 5 Nights package covering Kuala Lumpur, Langkawi. Enjoy comfortable stays, private transfers, and guided sightseeing throughout your journey.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Airport Transfer from KLIA (Kuala Lumpur International Airport) to Kuala Lumpur Hotel (Private) + KL Night Tour + KL Tower (Observation Deck) (SIC)
itinerary.detail: Upon arrival at Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA), our representative will meet & greet you and transfer you to your hotel in Kuala Lumpur. Check in at hotel. In the evening, enjoy a KL Night Tour and visit KL Tower Observation Deck for stunning night views of the city skyline. Return to hotel. Overnight at Kuala Lumpur hotel.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Genting Highlands Day Trip (2 way cable car + Enroute Batu Caves - 20 minute photo stop) (SIC)
itinerary.detail: Today, enjoy a full day trip to Genting Highlands. On the way, stop at Batu Caves for a 20-minute photo stop. At Genting, enjoy a scenic 2-way cable car ride to the hilltop. Experience the cool mountain weather and beautiful panoramic views. Return to Kuala Lumpur hotel. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Day 3: Airport Transfer from Kuala Lumpur Hotel to KLIA (Private) + Flight to Langkawi + Airport Transfer from Langkawi International Airport to Langkawi Hotel (Private)
itinerary.detail: After breakfast, check out from your Kuala Lumpur hotel. Transfer by private vehicle to KLIA for your flight to Langkawi. Upon arrival at Langkawi International Airport, our representative will meet & greet you and transfer you to your hotel in Langkawi. Check in at hotel. Rest of the day free at leisure. Overnight at Langkawi hotel.

itinerary.title: Day 4: Half Day City Tour of Langkawi (Private)
itinerary.detail: Enjoy a Half Day City Tour of Langkawi. City tour includes visit to Kuah Town, Eagle Square, Underwater World (no entrance), and Atma Alam Craft Centre. Return to hotel. Afternoon and evening free for leisure. Overnight at Langkawi hotel.
